_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of modes of communication used by a target, such as cable, fiber optic, satellite, microwave, VSAT, or combinations of these.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems and methods used to collect, store, and maintain each type.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.364), LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.361).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.289). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, used]. DCWF-only terms [cable, combinations, communication, fiber, microwave, modes] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.872, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of modes of communication used by a target, such as cable, fiber optic" and "Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.389 > STS 0.289 (gap +0.100). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, used] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, used]. DCWF-only: [cable, combinations, communication, fiber, microwave, modes]. WIDAI-only: [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational].
